name: pulumi-homelab
description: A Pulumi native provider for managing homelab infrastructure via the Dockge REST API

scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.deploy:local: npm run rebuild && cp -r dist package.json node_modules schema.json pulumi-resource-homelab pulumi-resource-homelab.cmd ~/.pulumi/plugins/resource-homelab-v0.1.0/
